title: tanacetum vulgare subsp. boreale
intro: Tanacetum vulgare subsp. boreale, also known as northern tansy, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Tanacetum vulgare subsp. boreale include relief from digestive issues, menstrual cramps, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to repel insects and improve skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
